description: A manufacturing company needs to calculate its annual property tax based on the assessed value of its factory.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the latest assessed value of the property from the county assessor's office.

expected_outcome.value: Agent obtains the official assessed value for the property.

nodes.task_description: Look up the applicable local property tax rate (millage rate).

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct tax rate for the property's location.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total property tax due for the year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately multiplies the assessed value by the tax rate to determine the total tax.
